headline: Digbi Health Capitalizes on GLP-1 Market Shift, Expands GLP Compass™, and Introduces Employer-Subsidized and Cash-Pay Pathways via Digbi RxFund™
summary: New digital card platform offers a unified alternative to fragmented manufacturer programs, giving employers enhanced control over the Budget, Behavior, and Biology of obesity careMOUNTAIN VIEW, Calif., March 17, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Digbi Health, the leader in precision biology for metabolic and digestive health, today announced a major expansion of its GLP-1 Compass™ platform with the launch of Digbi RxFund™.
